title: Mild Egyptian Vermicelli Noodles
description: A quick and easy Egyptian dish featuring vermicelli rice noodles, this recipe is a great option for a weeknight dinner, with a fluffy and earthy flavor profile that is also FODMAP-friendly.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the vermicelli rice noodles and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the salt, black pepper, and paprika, and stir to combine.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
